text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>!
Thanks for inviting me out today!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: So what are we doing today?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
A hike? You mean in the woods or something? I
go there often for training.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: That sounds good to me. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
We're really deep into the woods, aren't we? I've
never been here befo—

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's quite a steep hill up ahead! Look at
how much the path twists and turns too... Not to
mention the wind!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea this was here. I bet it would make a
perfect place for training...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Um... Have you been using this area as a training
location, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for showing me such an invaluable
place!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about implementing a new
training regimen for Meek, so this is perfect
timing!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I really can't thank you enough!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so modest! I won't let this favor go to
waste! Forgive my eagerness, but—

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I'm going to give it a try now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of a sudden, Kiryuin begins to run up the
slope in a fine display of athleticism.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's back by my side in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hm... It's less slippery than I thought. So maybe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This time she takes off in a different direction...
but the path is blocked in multiple places by
fallen trees!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Phew! This is great!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I only ran through some preliminary exercises,
but... I was able to confirm almost everything that
I needed!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Those fallen trees are the perfect height for
jumping over, and the soil is firm enough for safe
landings!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing especially dangerous out here, so
this is the perfect place to train!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you! This is also thanks to the Trainer's
Handbook!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
"Train not only your mind, but also your body.
There is much to be learned from honing your
physique."

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I was a kid, I've played every sport you
can imagine and put that wisdom to use.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm far from a professional athlete, of course. Nor
am I a match for an Umamusume when it comes to
running.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But I believe I've learned enough to pass on my
experience.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: N-not at all... I'm still just a novice, really...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But it makes me happy to hear such praise from a
contemporary.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I promise I won't disappoint you. I'll continue to
work hard from now on!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, thank you for showing me this place!
Once I get home, I'm going to work on that
training regimen!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I'll be sure to share it with you once I'm
done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Trainer Kiryuin shares her new
special training regime with me, just like she
promised.
